creator: rdivacky@FreeBSD.org
text:
The example from

http://www.netbsd.org/~joerg/ifunc.tar.gz

when compiled with a compiler that can handle IFUNC (I tried gcc49 or clang35) shows that *_IRELATIVE relocation is not applied to *_GLOB_DAT and thus the output of the test app is something like:

called foo1
0x80081a713 0x80081a6ca
called foo1
0x80081a713 0x80081a6ca

when the two addresses printed should be equal.
